text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm walking down the<n>hallway, I
notice Rice Shower looking<n>rather gloomy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... What do I do? What do I do...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... Nothing happened, but... Well, the<n>weather
forecast says there'll be<n>heavy rain tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was planning to train a lot tomorrow<n>since I've
got a race coming up, but<n>now... Oh, I don't know
what to do!
choice_data_list: Rent out the gymnasium and run there!
Make some sunshine dolls to ward off the rain!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It won't be the same as running on a<n>track, but I
suggest she train in the<n>gym so she can practice
her<n>acceleration in straight sprints.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But if I rent it out for myself, doesn't<n>that mean
nobody else will be able to<n>use the gym?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I suggest that she invite other<n>Umamusume to
train with her, and she<n>seems much happier with
the idea<n>after that.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that makes sense! Thanks for<n>your
suggestion! Ehehe, I'm excited<n>to run tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And with that, her training session<n>goes off
without a hitch.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That's a great idea! I'm sure the<n>skies will clear
if we make a lot of<n>them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Let's make really cute ones. I want to<n>make a
blue one...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh! But... No, this won't work...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If I make them, they'll probably just<n>bring a
whole storm down on us<n>instead...
choice_data_list:
Don't worry. I'll make a whole bunch of them
too.

Don't worry. I'll make a whole bunch of them
too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really? What a relief! I'm sure they'llwork fine if you do it! I'll makethe best sunshine dolls I can!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The skies must have heard Rice<n>Shower's pleas,
because there isn't<n>a single cloud to be seen the
next day.
